examples: Mary Ann shot him a rueful look.
He shook his head and gave me a rueful smile.
The boy's first outcry was a rueful laugh.
She listened to America's victims of the Vietnam war, both traumatised veterans and rueful ex-protesters.
Cromer successfully creates a Chekhovian atmosphere with Nelson's script, with some characters reminiscing out loud while others experience quiet, sometimes rueful epiphanies.
